        public const string Invoice = "invoice";

,
  Billing_IPaymentStrategy.PaymentStrategyRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace Billing
{
    public static partial class PaymentStrategyRegistry
    {
        private static readonly IStrategyRegistry<string, global::Billing.IPaymentStrategy> _instance = new StrategyRegistry<string, global::Billing.IPaymentStrategy>(new Dictionary<string, global::Billing.IPaymentStrategy> { ["invoice"] = new global::Billing.InvoicePayment() });
        public static IStrategyRegistry<string, global::Billing.IPaymentStrategy> Instance
        {
            get
            {
                return _instance;
            }
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />

    public static partial class PaymentStrategyKeys

        public const string Card = "card";
    }

,
  Sales_IPaymentStrategy.PaymentStrategyRegistry.g.cs:
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace Sales
{
    public static partial class PaymentStrategyRegistry
    {
        private static readonly IStrategyRegistry<string, global::Sales.IPaymentStrategy> _instance = new StrategyRegistry<string, global::Sales.IPaymentStrategy>(new Dictionary<string, global::Sales.IPaymentStrategy> { ["card"] = new global::Sales.CardPayment() });
        public static IStrategyRegistry<string, global::Sales.IPaymentStrategy> Instance
        {
            get
            {
                return _instance;
            }
        }
    }
}// <auto-generated />
